behavior_change_rationale.7: Implementation authorization does not imply commit authorization.
behavior_change_rationale.8: Review cadence follows milestones, risk, and user policy rather than a fixed commit count.
behavior_change_rationale.9: Repeated failures without new evidence cause replanning or escalation.
behavior_change_rationale.10: An approved orchestrator or goal handoff is consumed directly instead of creating a routing loop.
